data.query: average one-bed rent Clapham London 2025 per week per month
data.results:
### Web Search: one-bed rent in Clapham
Rightmove (market trends): one-bedroom flats in Clapham typically let for about £1,900-£2,600 per month (roughly £440-£600 per week).
Zoopla: median asking rent for a Clapham one-bed is around £2,100 pcm (about £485 per week).
HomeLet rental index (SW London): average one-bed around £2,050 pcm.
Note: these are area ranges / medians, not a quote for a specific flat.
